arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's best Manchester United XI is taking shape - there are only two spaces up for grabs
arts.sum: Manchester United beat Manchester City on Sunday and the team news gave clear indication as to Ruben Amorim's first choice team

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Ruben Amorim dealt fresh blow as Marcus Rashford learns his fate
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim will be looking to strengthen his Manchester United squad in the January transfer window, but with two weeks still to go before it opens, the boss has already been dealt a blow

arts.ttl: Former Man Utd star BACKS Sir Jim Ratcliffe over decisions at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe has made a number of unpopular decisions since taking control of Manchester United and faced protests from fans ahead of the recent win over Everton

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford 'sent home from training' as Man Utd star admits he wants to leave
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford says he'd like to pursue a new challenge away from Manchester United after he was left out of the squad for the derby win over Manchester City

arts.ttl: England wonderkid makes contract U-TURN amid Man Utd interest
arts.sum: Dibling had been expected to sign a new deal at St Mary’s, with former Southampton boss Russell Martin recently admitting that he was eager to pen fresh terms with the Saints. Tyler Dibling to Man Utd?

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres hints at Sporting CP exit as Manchester United put on red alert
arts.sum: A reunion between Viktor Gyokeres and Ruben Amorim continues to be hugely speculated at Manchester United

arts.ttl: Why Andy Robertson will not be suspended for Liverpool's Premier League clash with Tottenham
arts.sum: Andy Robertson saw red against Fulham for hauling down Harry Wilson - but the fine details of Premier League rules means he is able to face Tottenham.

arts.ttl: 47% win rate: Manager of London rivals would love to replace Ange Postecoglou at Tottenham
arts.sum: The future of Ange Postecoglou has come into question in recent weeks and it appears that a current Premier League boss would be interested in the Australian’s role at Tottenham.
